name: Sourdough Sams
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Stir the dry mixture into the liquid ingredients until just combined.
3. Roll out the dough and cut with a regular donut cutter.
4. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 390 degrees F (200 degrees C).
5. Fry the doughnuts, turning occasionally, until golden brown.
6. Remove from oil and place on paper towels to drain excess grease.
7. Dust with powdered sugar or cinnamon sugar before serving.
8. These doughnuts can be made ahead of time and frozen for later use. Thaw as needed and fry before serving.
